title: Myths and Legends Datapack
description: This is a Datapack which is needed for the Myths and Legends addon going forward from versions higher than 1.3 in order to add spawns that use the key items as a spawning condition
body:
The MythsAndLegends-Datapack is a crucial configuration pack for the Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon. This datapack contains specific configurations for certain legendary and mythical Pokémon, enabling their unique spawning conditions and behaviors in the game. Starting from versions higher than 1.3, this datapack is necessary to fully utilize the features of the Myths and Legends addon.

In the Cobblemon Myths and Legends Sidemod, key items directly influence spawning conditions. When a player holds these items, they fulfill specific conditions, causing certain legendary or mythical Pokémon to spawn exclusively around that player. This mechanic works independently for multiple players, each holding the necessary items.

Key items can be found in selected loot chests by default, and their rarity and specific loot tables can be configured in the settings. This allows for a customized gameplay experience where players can adjust how and where these items appear in the game world.

For more information about the Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon, visit the addon pages on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-sidemod) or [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/myths-and-legends-cobblemon-addon).

For detailed spawn-related information of the current state of the datapack, including every biome, key items, and all other additional conditions, access the Myths and Legends Wiki [here](https://wiki.0skill.de/).

## Features

- **Configuration Pack**: Contains specific configurations for legendary and mythical Pokémon.
- **Advanced Spawning Mechanics**: Key items directly influence Pokémon spawning conditions.
- **Player-Specific Spawning**: Multiple players can independently hold key items to fulfill unique spawning conditions.

## Installation

1. Ensure you have the Cobblemon Myths and Legends Addon installed.
2. Download the MythsAndLegends-Datapack.
3. Place the datapack in the `datapacks` folder of your Minecraft world save.
4. Launch Minecraft and load your world.
5. Run the command `/reload` to activate the datapack.

## Support

For assistance, improvements, suggestions, feature requests, and technical support, please join our Discord server: [Join Now](https://discord.com/invite/EDesfBH2aS). 

Thank you for using and contributing to MythsAndLegends-Datapack!
